activity_summary: A customer success manager reviews renewal risk and decides save plan, executive escalation, or wait for usage evidence.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Static renewal risk review UI centered on account evidence, decision choice, and a renewal handoff.
parsed.css: .renewal-risk-review{font-family:Inter,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",sans-serif;background:#f6f7f4;color:#1c2520;min-height:900px;padding:24px;box-sizing:border-box}.rr-shell{max-width:1290px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:280px 1fr 360px;gap:18px}.rr-top{grid-column:1/-1;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;border-bottom:1px solid #d9ded6;padding-bottom:16px}.rr-kicker{font-size:12px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#667268;font-weight:700}.rr-top h1{margin:4px 0 0;font-size:28px;letter-spacing:0;line-height:1.15}.rr-meta{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center}.pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;border:1px solid #cbd3ca;border-radius:999px;padding:6px 10px;background:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#445047}.panel{background:#fff;border:1px solid #dfe4dc;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(28,37,32,.05)}.panel h2{font-size:14px;margin:0 0 12px;color:#26302a}.queue{padding:16px}.queue-list{display:grid;gap:10px}.account-row{width:100%;border:1px solid #dfe4dc;background:#fbfcfa;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;text-align:left;display:grid;gap:5px;color:#26302a}.account-row.active{border-color:#1f7a68;background:#eef8f5;box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 #1f7a68}.row-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-weight:800;font-size:13px}.row-sub{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;color:#657066;font-size:12px}.main-stack{display:grid;gap:18px}.account-card{padding:18px}.account-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;align-items:flex-start}.account-title h2{font-size:22px;margin:2px 0}.account-title p{margin:0;color:#5d695f;font-size:13px}.status{background:#fff3d6;border:1px solid #efd078;color:#6f4c00;border-radius:999px;padding:7px 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:800}.fact-grid{margin-top:18px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px}.fact{background:#f7f8f5;border:1px solid #e5e9e2;border-radius:8px;padding:11px}.fact span{display:block;color:#657066;font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;font-weight:800}.fact strong{display:block;margin-top:5px;font-size:14px}.evidence{padding:18px}.evidence-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px}.evidence-item{border:1px solid #e3e7df;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;min-height:118px;background:#fff}.evidence-item.warning{border-color:#e7c56a;background:#fffaf0}.evidence-item h3{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:14px}.evidence-item p{margin:0;color:#4d5a51;font-size:13px;line-height:1.45}.policy{padding:16px;border-left:4px solid #345995;background:#f7f9ff}.policy p{margin:0;color:#2d3a50;font-size:13px;line-height:1.45}.side-stack{display:grid;gap:18px}.decision,.handoff{padding:16px}.decision-options{display:grid;gap:10px}.decision-card{border:1px solid #dfe4dc;background:#fbfcfa;border-radius:8px;padding:12px}.decision-card.selected{border-color:#1f7a68;background:#eff8f4}.decision-card strong{display:block;font-size:14px}.decision-card span{display:block;margin-top:5px;color:#5e6a61;font-size:12px;line-height:1.35}.action-row{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:14px}.btn{border:1px solid #cbd3ca;background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:9px 11px;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:#26302a}.btn.primary{background:#1f7a68;border-color:#1f7a68;color:#fff}.btn.warn{border-color:#d9a72f;background:#fff7df}.handoff-list{display:grid;gap:10px}.handoff-line{border-top:1px solid #e6eae3;padding-top:10px}.handoff-line:first-child{border-top:0;padding-top:0}.handoff-line span{display:block;color:#667268;font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;font-weight:800}.handoff-line strong,.handoff-line p{display:block;margin:4px 0 0;font-size:13px;line-height:1.4}.handoff-line p{color:#344038}.handoff .btn{width:100%;justify-content:center;margin-top:14px}.note{font-size:12px;color:#667268;line-height:1.4;margin-top:12px}@media (max-width:1000px){.renewal-risk-review{padding:16px}.rr-shell{grid-template-columns:1fr}.rr-top{align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;flex-direction:column}.fact-grid,.evidence-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.side-stack{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
parsed.html:
B2B renewal risk

Renewal risk review

Weekly account meeting3 at-risk renewals

Renewal queue

Selected account

Northstar Labs

Renewal risk review before the account planning meeting.

Champion change
AccountAC-903
PlanEnterprise annual
Renewal value$84K ARR
Current callEvidence follow-up

Risk evidence

Usage trend

Usage dropped 28 percent across the last two reporting periods.

Champion change

The primary champion left the account last month, leaving sponsor support unclear.

Procurement timeline

The procurement date is still missing and should be confirmed before escalation.

Renewal policy

Executive escalation fits when sponsor risk and renewal timing are clear. Resolve the missing procurement date before committing a save plan.

Decision path

Start save planHold until the procurement timeline is known.
Escalate executive sponsorUse when sponsor risk and renewal timing are both clear.
Request procurement dateBest next step before committing the save plan.

Decision: wait for stronger usage and procurement evidence before save plan commitment.

Renewal handoff

Next ownerCustomer success manager
Next actionRequest the procurement date before committing the save plan.
Risk reason

Champion changed and usage dropped 28 percent across the last two reporting periods.

Evidence gap

Procurement timing is missing before executive escalation or save plan ownership can be confirmed.
